<!-- Auto-generated by scripts/gen_mcp_docs.py; do not edit by hand. -->

<ResponseField name="Workspaces" type="Namespace">
  <Expandable title="Tools">
    <ResponseField name="workspaces_list_workspaces" type="tool">
      List all workspaces accessible to the authenticated user. Returns a JSON array of workspace objects with id, name, and role.
    </ResponseField>
  </Expandable>
</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="Workflows" type="Namespace">
  <Expandable title="Tools">
    <ResponseField name="workflows_create_workflow" type="tool">
      Create a new workflow in a workspace.
    </ResponseField>
    <ResponseField name="workflows_get_workflow" type="tool">
      Get metadata for a specific workflow.
    </ResponseField>
    <ResponseField name="workflows_get_workflow_file" type="tool">
      Export a workflow to a staged download URL.
    </ResponseField>
    <ResponseField name="workflows_prepare_workflow_file_upload" type="tool">
      Prepare a staged workflow file upload for remote `/mcp` clients. Clients typically save and upload files locally before handing them to the remote MCP upload URL returned by this tool.
    </ResponseField>
    <ResponseField name="workflows_create_workflow_from_uploaded_file" type="tool">
      Create a workflow from a previously staged workflow file upload.
    </ResponseField>
    <ResponseField name="workflows_update_workflow_from_uploaded_file" type="tool">
      Update a workflow from a previously staged workflow file upload.
    </ResponseField>
    <ResponseField name="workflows_update_workflow" type="tool">
      Update workflow metadata.
    </ResponseField>
    <ResponseField name="workflows_list_workflows" type="tool">
      List workflows in a workspace.
    </ResponseField>
    <ResponseField name="workflows_list_workflow_tree" type="tool">
      List workflow folders and workflows under a path.
    </ResponseField>
    <ResponseField name="workflows_create_workflow_folder" type="tool">
      Create a workflow folder by absolute path.
    </ResponseField>
    <ResponseField name="workflows_move_workflows" type="tool">
      Move workflows into or out of a folder. This tool is best-effort and non-atomic. If one workflow fails to move, the remaining workflow moves still proceed.
    </ResponseField>
    <ResponseField name="workflows_list_actions" type="tool">
      Search or browse available actions and return compact context metadata. Supports three usage modes: - **Search**: provide `query` to search by name/description across all namespaces. Example: list_actions(workspace_id, query="send message") - **Browse namespace**: provide `namespace` without `query` to list all actions in a namespace. Example: list_actions(workspace_id, namespace="tools.slack") - **Browse all**: omit both to list all available actions. Common namespaces: `core`, `tools.slack`, `tools.crowdstrike`, `tools.okta`, `ai`.
    </ResponseField>
    <ResponseField name="workflows_get_action_context" type="tool">
      Get full schema and configuration context for a single action. Use this after discovering an action via `list_actions` to get the complete parameter schema needed to write the `args:` block in a workflow definition. Example action names: "core.http_request", "tools.slack.post_message", "core.script.run_python", "core.transform.reshape".
    </ResponseField>
    <ResponseField name="workflows_get_workflow_authoring_context" type="tool">
      Get compact workflow authoring context for selected actions. Returns everything needed to write a workflow definition: action schemas, available secrets, and workspace variables. Use this before calling `create_workflow` or `update_workflow`. Two input modes (provide one or neither): - **By name**: pass `action_names_json` as a JSON array of action names, e.g. '["core.http_request", "tools.slack.post_message"]' - **By search**: pass `query` to search for actions by name/description
    </ResponseField>
    <ResponseField name="workflows_validate_workflow" type="tool">
      Validate a workflow's draft state. Checks that the workflow DSL is structurally sound and that arguments are valid.
    </ResponseField>
    <ResponseField name="workflows_prepare_template_file_upload" type="tool">
      Prepare a staged template YAML upload for remote `/mcp` clients.
    </ResponseField>
    <ResponseField name="workflows_validate_template_action" type="tool">
      Validate a template action YAML file. Validates YAML parsing, template schema correctness, step action references, argument schemas, and expression references.
    </ResponseField>
    <ResponseField name="workflows_publish_workflow" type="tool">
      Publish (commit) a workflow, creating a new versioned definition. This validates the workflow, freezes registry dependencies, and creates a new workflow definition version.
    </ResponseField>
    <ResponseField name="workflows_run_draft_workflow" type="tool">
      Run a workflow from its current draft state (without publishing). Optionally update the workflow's title/description before running.
    </ResponseField>
    <ResponseField name="workflows_run_published_workflow" type="tool">
      Run the latest published version of a workflow. The workflow must have been published (committed) at least once.
    </ResponseField>
    <ResponseField name="workflows_list_workflow_executions" type="tool">
      List recent executions for a workflow. Use this to see run history, check which runs succeeded or failed, and find execution IDs for deeper inspection with get_workflow_execution.
    </ResponseField>
    <ResponseField name="workflows_get_workflow_execution" type="tool">
      Get status and details of a specific workflow execution. Returns execution metadata (status, timing) and a compact event timeline showing each action's status, timing, and any errors. Use this to debug failed runs or check the progress of running workflows.
    </ResponseField>
    <ResponseField name="workflows_get_webhook" type="tool">
      Get webhook configuration for a workflow.
    </ResponseField>
    <ResponseField name="workflows_update_webhook" type="tool">
      Update webhook configuration for a workflow.
    </ResponseField>
    <ResponseField name="workflows_get_case_trigger" type="tool">
      Get case trigger configuration for a workflow.
    </ResponseField>
    <ResponseField name="workflows_update_case_trigger" type="tool">
      Update an existing case trigger for a workflow.
    </ResponseField>
    <ResponseField name="workflows_list_workflow_tags" type="tool">
      List workflow tag definitions in a workspace. Returns a JSON array of tag objects with `id`, `name`, `ref`, and `color`.
    </ResponseField>
    <ResponseField name="workflows_create_workflow_tag" type="tool">
      Create a workflow tag definition.
    </ResponseField>
    <ResponseField name="workflows_update_workflow_tag" type="tool">
      Update a workflow tag definition.
    </ResponseField>
    <ResponseField name="workflows_delete_workflow_tag" type="tool">
      Delete a workflow tag definition.
    </ResponseField>
    <ResponseField name="workflows_list_tags_for_workflow" type="tool">
      List tags attached to a workflow. Returns a JSON array of tag objects with `id`, `name`, `ref`, and `color`.
    </ResponseField>
    <ResponseField name="workflows_add_workflow_tag" type="tool">
      Attach an existing workflow tag definition to a workflow.
    </ResponseField>
    <ResponseField name="workflows_remove_workflow_tag" type="tool">
      Remove a workflow tag association from a workflow.
    </ResponseField>
  </Expandable>
</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="Cases" type="Namespace">
  <Expandable title="Tools">
    <ResponseField name="cases_list_case_tags" type="tool">
      List case tag definitions in a workspace. Returns a JSON array of tag objects with `id`, `name`, `ref`, and `color`.
    </ResponseField>
    <ResponseField name="cases_create_case_tag" type="tool">
      Create a case tag definition.
    </ResponseField>
    <ResponseField name="cases_update_case_tag" type="tool">
      Update a case tag definition.
    </ResponseField>
    <ResponseField name="cases_delete_case_tag" type="tool">
      Delete a case tag definition.
    </ResponseField>
    <ResponseField name="cases_list_tags_for_case" type="tool">
      List tags attached to a case. Returns a JSON array of tag objects with `id`, `name`, `ref`, and `color`.
    </ResponseField>
    <ResponseField name="cases_add_case_tag" type="tool">
      Attach a case tag to a case.
    </ResponseField>
    <ResponseField name="cases_remove_case_tag" type="tool">
      Remove a case tag association from a case.
    </ResponseField>
    <ResponseField name="cases_list_case_fields" type="tool">
      List case field definitions in a workspace. Returns a JSON array of field objects with `id`, `type`, `description`, `nullable`, `default`, `reserved`, and `options`.
    </ResponseField>
    <ResponseField name="cases_create_case_field" type="tool">
      Create a case field definition.
    </ResponseField>
    <ResponseField name="cases_update_case_field" type="tool">
      Update a case field definition.
    </ResponseField>
    <ResponseField name="cases_delete_case_field" type="tool">
      Delete a case field definition.
    </ResponseField>
  </Expandable>
</ResponseField>

    <ResponseField name="tables_list_tables" type="tool">

    </ResponseField>

  <Expandable title="Tools">

<ResponseField name="Integrations" type="Namespace">
  <Expandable title="Tools">
    <ResponseField name="integrations_list_integrations" type="tool">

    </ResponseField>

</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="Agents" type="Namespace">
  <Expandable title="Tools">
    <ResponseField name="agents_get_agent_preset_authoring_context" type="tool">
      Get models, integrations, output_type guidance, and other preset authoring context.
    </ResponseField>
    <ResponseField name="agents_create_agent_preset" type="tool">
      Create an agent preset in the selected workspace.
    </ResponseField>
    <ResponseField name="agents_list_agent_presets" type="tool">
      List agent presets in a workspace with their capabilities. Returns each preset's slug, name, description, model, instructions, configured actions (tools), and namespaces.
    </ResponseField>
    <ResponseField name="agents_run_agent_preset" type="tool">
      Run an agent preset with a prompt and return text or approval status. Creates an ephemeral session, triggers the agent workflow, and waits for the response. The agent has access to all tools configured on the preset.
    </ResponseField>
  </Expandable>
</ResponseField>
